arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou told only thing that will save Tottenham's season from 'disaster'
arts.sum: Big Ange is coming under pressure after a poor run of results that has left Spurs languishing in the bottom half of the Premier League table ahead of Sunday's trip to Everton

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars sent pointed message by Son Heung-min as Archie Gray admission made
arts.sum: EVERTON vs TOTTENHAM: Son Heung-min is looking to rally his Spurs troops as they bid to bounce back from the midweek north London derby defeat against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Frustrated Everton star Jake O'Brien insists Toffees are too good to go down
arts.sum: Everton are in deep trouble and they have won just one of their last 12 Premier League games, scoring just twice in that time, with David Moyes now replacing Sean Dyche

arts.ttl: Tottenham injury crisis deepens as Dominic Solanke is ruled OUT of Everton game - and there are fears £65million man could miss more matches - in another blow for Ange Postecoglou's strugglers
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY SAMI MOKBEL: Tottenham have suffered a key injury blow with Dominic Solanke set to miss Sunday's clash against Everton amid concerns he will miss further crucial games.

arts.ttl: 'Should be involved': Postecoglou says 'outstanding' Spurs star could play tomorrow for first time in 11 games
arts.sum: Finally some good news for Spurs

arts.ttl: ‘Blimey’: Chris Sutton says Everton could be in trouble because of ‘hesitant’ player
arts.sum: Everton are moving into a new era. The Toffees have new owners, David Moyes is back in tow at Goodison Park, and we’re only a...

arts.ttl: Everton supporters asked to play their part against Tottenham as Goodison Park celebrated
arts.sum: Everton's visit of Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday will be the latest 'themed' day to mark Goodison Park's farewell season

arts.ttl: Ben Davies decision made as £40m man returns: Tottenham predicted XI v Everton
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will once again look to get back to winning ways when they head to Everton in the Premier League on Sunday. Spurs fell...

arts.ttl: Are injuries to blame? Postecoglou’s Tottenham heading for worst league finish in 16 years
arts.sum: On Sunday Tottenham make the trip to Merseyside with a desperate need for all three points. Ange Postecoglou’s team have now gone five league matches without picking up a win and...

arts.ttl: Why PSG and the San Antonio Spurs have struck a partnership
arts.sum: Ligue 1 giants PSG and NBA franchise the San Antonio Spurs are set to take advantage of the NBA Paris Games to strike a deal that will see the two teams work in partnership going ahead. “Paris Saint-Germain is thrilled to collaborate with the San Antonio Spurs, a team that shares our dedication to excellence, innovation, and community engagement,” PSG CEO Victoriano Melero said.
